assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 19-22: Age is 4 days, threshold is 14 days, 'well within the 14-day freshness threshold. No staleness warning is emitted.' Header confirms 'Result: PASS (No Staleness Warning)'.

assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 22: 'No user prompt is required.' Lines 29-30: 'Step 0.3 completes silently -- no options are presented to the user and no confirmation is needed.'
